title: Container State
description: Schema for the observed container state collected by Tier 2 assessment. Records what containers are actually running, their actual image digests, volume mounts, resource usage, and compose file hashes. Feeds the container compatibility checker on restore.

cell_id.description: Stable unique identity of the Infrastructure Cell

vmid.description: Proxmox VM ID of the host running these containers

vm_name.description: VM name as configured in Proxmox

collected_at.description: Timestamp when this container state was collected

container_runtime.description: Primary container runtime detected on this VM. null if no runtime found.

containers.description: Observed container instances on this VM

compose_files.description: Compose or Quadlet files detected on this VM, with their current content hashes

collection_errors.description: Errors encountered during container state collection

name.description: Container name as reported by the runtime

image.description: Full image reference as reported by the runtime

image_digest.description: SHA256 digest of the running image. Collected via 'podman inspect' or 'docker inspect'. Null if runtime did not report it.

image_tag.description: Image tag in use. May differ from declared tag if image was pulled more recently.

declared_digest.description: The image digest declared in bootstrap-state for this container. Used for drift detection: if observed != declared, the image has changed.

digest_drift.description: True if observed image_digest differs from declared_digest

networks.description: Networks this container is attached to

env_vars.description: Non-secret environment variables observed at collection time. Secret values are not collected.

uptime_seconds.description: Container uptime in seconds at collection time

restart_count.description: Number of times this container has been restarted

health_status.description: Container health check status if configured

in_bootstrap_state.description: True if a corresponding container_declaration exists in bootstrap-state.json

compose_file_drift.description: True if the compose file on disk differs from the declared file digest in bootstrap-state

file_path.description: Absolute path to the compose or Quadlet file on the VM filesystem

file_digest.description: SHA256 of the current file content

declared_digest.description: The file digest declared in bootstrap-state. Used for drift detection.

drift.description: True if current file_digest differs from declared_digest

container_resource_usage.description: Observed resource usage for a running container at collection time

cpu_percent.description: CPU utilisation as a percentage at collection time

ram_usage_mb.description: RAM currently in use by this container in MB

ram_limit_mb.description: RAM limit configured for this container in MB. null if no limit.

disk_usage_gb.description: Total disk used by this container's writable layer and named volumes in GB
